title: SoundHound AI Inc (SOUN) Q1 2026 Earnings Report Preview: What To Look For
text: SoundHound AI is scheduled to release Q1 2026 earnings on May 7, 2026. The consensus outlook calls for revenue of $42.56 million with earnings of -$0.10 per share. Full Year 2026 Projections include revenue expected at $232.78 million and earnings anticipated at -$0.33 per share. In the previous quarter (Q4 2025), SoundHound exceeded expectations, delivering actual revenue of $55.06 million, which beat analysts' revenue expectations of $53.99 million by 1.98%. The company also reported earnings of $0.10 per share versus expectations of -$0.09 per share. Eight analysts offer an average 12-month price target of $14.63, suggesting potential upside of approximately 60%. The consensus brokerage recommendation indicates Outperform status. However, the analysis notes that GuruFocus has detected 4 Warning Signs with SOUN.
